description: Valid subagent configuration for Claude Code

description.description: Brief description of what the agent does. Claude uses this to decide when to delegate.

tools.description: Comma-separated list of allowed tools. By default, subagents inherit all tools from the main conversation including MCP tools.
tools.note: MCP tools can also be included as mcp__<server>__<tool>. Use Agent(type1, type2) to restrict which subagent types can be spawned.

disallowedTools.description: Comma-separated list of tools to deny from inherited or specified list

model.description: Which Claude model to use. Also accepts full model IDs (e.g. claude-opus-4-6). 'inherit' uses the same model as the main conversation.

maxTurns.description: Maximum number of agentic turns before the subagent stops

skills.description: Comma-separated list of skill names to preload into the subagent's context at startup. Full skill content is injected, not just made available. Subagents don't inherit skills from parent.

mcpServers.description: MCP servers available to this subagent. Each entry is either a string (referencing an already-configured server) or an inline definition with server name as key and full MCP server config as value.
example:
- playwright:
    type: stdio
    command: npx
    args: ["-y", "@playwright/mcp@latest"]

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks scoped to this subagent (same format as global hooks). Stop hooks in frontmatter are converted to SubagentStop events.

memory.description: Persistent memory scope. Gives the subagent a persistent directory that survives across conversations.

background.description: Set to true to always run this subagent as a background task. Background subagents auto-deny unapproved permissions.

isolation.description: Set to 'worktree' to run the subagent in a temporary git worktree, giving it an isolated copy of the repository. Automatically cleaned up if no changes.

builtInAgents.description: Claude Code includes several built-in subagent types

Explore.tools: Read-only tools (denied access to Write and Edit)

Plan.tools: Read-only tools (denied access to Write and Edit)

general-purpose.purpose: Complex multi-step tasks requiring exploration and action

Claude Code Guide.purpose: Answer questions about Claude Code features

structure.description: YAML frontmatter followed by system prompt
structure.example:
---
name: agent-name
description: What this agent does
tools: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash
model: inherit
---

You are a specialized agent for...

## Instructions
...

examples: Use a subagent to review the code
Use the [name] agent to analyze security
Launch a subagent for deep investigation

notes.backgroundExecution: Subagents can run concurrently in the background. Pre-approved permissions required.
notes.resumption: Subagents can be resumed with full conversation history using agent IDs.
notes.mcpTools: Background subagents cannot use MCP tools.
notes.autoCompaction: Subagents support automatic compaction like the main conversation.
notes.noNesting: Subagents cannot spawn other subagents. Use Skills or chain from main conversation.
notes.taskRenamed: In v2.1.63, the Task tool was renamed to Agent. Existing Task(...) references still work as aliases.
notes.disableSubagent: Deny specific subagents via permissions: Agent(Explore), Agent(my-custom-agent)
